title: House Armed Services Committee
text:
Full Committee Hearing: Speed to Scale: Revitalizing the Defense Industrial Base
The committee will receive testimony from Under Secretary of Defense for Acquisition and Sustainment Michael P. Duffey regarding efforts to revitalize the Defense Industrial Base.
RDY Hearing: Energy, Installations, and Environment Update
The Readiness Subcommittee will get a programmatic update on military construction (MILCON), environmental programs, energy programs, base operations support (BOS), and facility sustainment, restoration, and modernization (FSRM) accounts.
